title: Classic Civilization Event
description: Modpack for the MARCUSK Classic Civilization Event
body:
# 🏛️ Classic Civilization Event - Client Pack 
Welcome to the **Classic Civilization Event**, an exclusive **MARCUSK Event** where you'll journey through the ancient world!

## 🌍 Event Overview

In this event, you will explore and build civilizations across **three distinct climate zones**:

- ❄️ **Cold** – Challenging frozen lands where hardy civilizations forge powerful armies and master resource management.
- 🔥 **Warm** – Arid regions where control of water and oases leads to prosperous trade and monumental architecture.
- 🌿 **Temperate** – Balanced territories where moderate seasons allow for agricultural abundance and cultural advancement.

Establish trade routes, develop technology, and compete with other players to build the most advanced ancient empire!

## 🛠️ About This Modpack

This **client-side** modpack is designed to enhance your gameplay experience while maintaining compatibility with the event's official server. It includes:

- ⚡ **Performance Boosts** – Optimized mods for smoother gameplay even with large cities.
- 🎨 **Visual & UI Improvements** – Authentic ancient aesthetics and immersive historical details.
- 📜 **Quality of Life Additions** – Useful client-side tweaks without altering core mechanics.

## 📩 How to Join

Want to participate? **Apply on our Discord!**

[Join the MARCUSK Discord](https://discord.gg/marcusk) to get started.

Prepare for greatness, noble ruler! 🏛️✨
